## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ArrowUpNarrowWide;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ArrowUpNarrowWide { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
filter, sort, ascending, descending, increasing, decreasing, rising, falling

## Categories
text, layout, arrows
